case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS ROCHA, PAULA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-03-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-03-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 SETTLEMENT BETWEEN THE PARTIES FOR A TOTAL AMOUNT OF $5025.87. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE CONT'D FOR 6 MONTH INTERVALS UNTIL PAID OFF AT WHICH TIME, THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
